headline: F5 Expands AI-powered WAAP Solutions to Arm Enterprises Against Frontier AI Threats and Stop Attacks Before Exploitation
summary: SEATTLE, June 09, 2026--F5 (NASDAQ: FFIV), the global leader in delivering and securing every app and API, today announced new web application and API protection (WAAP) capabilities for its Application Delivery and Security Platform designed to keep enterprises ahead of a rapidly shifting threat landscape. Frontier AI models have collapsed the window between vulnerability discovery and active exploitation, giving threat actors faster, cheaper, and more available means of attack. F5 has expanded

headline: RBC Capital Maintains Outperform on F5, Raises Price Target to $450
summary: RBC Capital  analyst Matthew Hedberg   maintains F5 (NASDAQ:FFIV) with a Outperform and raises the price target from $425 to $450.
